title: Memory
description: Browse Auto Memory files written by Claude Code, and compare snapshots around /dream runs.
empty: No Auto Memory data found. Claude Code writes memory files to ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/ during sessions.
noProject: Select a project to browse its memory.
noMemory: This project has no memory topics yet.
dreamBanner: ⚠ /dream is a Research Preview feature. Its internal consolidation process is opaque — this panel compares memory snapshots taken by this tool before and after running /dream. Reliability depends on when snapshots were taken.
snapshotEmpty: No files in memory directory — snapshot taken (empty).
noSnapshots: No snapshots yet. Click "Snapshot current memory" before and after a /dream run to compare.
noChanges: No differences between the two snapshots.
